title: Eliminate silent catch {} blocks across CLI
description: 23 silent catch blocks swallow transient errors without logging. Debuggability nightmare — unreproducible bug reports forever.

context.text: Source (verbatim from 2026-05-16 audit): Audit Section 1: "23 silent catch blocks swallow transient errors with no log"

Replaced every unbound/empty catch in src/cli.ts with real handling or debug-only logSilent(error, context) calls gated by SWEECH_DEBUG=1/true and scrubSecrets. Added src/silentLogger.ts, eslint.config.mjs, npm run lint:cli, and tests/cliSilentCatch.test.ts so future src/cli.ts catch clauses cannot omit an error binding or empty-handler guard. Proof: rg catch-without-binding scan returned no matches; npm run lint:cli passed; npm test -- --runInBand tests/cliSilentCatch.test.ts passed, including built CLI list --json smoke for clean normal stderr and debug-only stderr; npm run build passed; npm test -- --runInBand passed; npm audit --audit-level=moderate found 0 vulnerabilities; swift build --package-path macos-menubar/SweechBar passed. Codex adversarial review ran and its findings were addressed; final re-review returned no blockers.

acceptanceCriteria: Every catch {} / catch { /* skip */ } replaced with a real handler or logSilent(err, context) under SWEECH_DEBUG=1
eslint rule added to prevent new silent catches
Existing tests still pass — silent-by-design cases retain silence with annotation comment
